CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-25-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-26-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Feb-03-2016 Off Calendar

Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendants And Cross-Complainants Helen Lippert And Robert Galemmo To Dissolve Temporary Restraining Order Entered On February 11, 2015 Regarding Their Personal Property And Order The Return Of That Property
Off Calendar Jan-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter Bales, Esq. (415-227-0900) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Golden Gateway.
Alex Weyand, Esq. (415-536-2856) for Defendants/Cross-Complainants/Moving party HELEN LIPPERT and ROBERT GALEMMO.

The Court announces the issues on the motions: pleadings are vague, dates are not clear, what transpired is not clear, valuation is not clear. Hearing is held. Both sides Argued. Defendant request an OSC on short notice dissolving TRO or requesting a preliminary injunction. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS HELEN LIPPERT and ROBERT GALEMMO's Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendants And Cross-Complainants Helen Lippert And Robert Galemmo To Dissolve Temporary Restraining Order Entered On February 11, 2015 Regarding Their Personal Property And Order The Return Of That Property. The Court will not rule grant this motion at this time. It further orders an Order to show cause for preliminary injunction - 2/18/16 at 9:30 am in Dept. 501. Plaintiff to file/serve moving papers - 2/2/16. Opposition - 2/11/16. Reply 2/16/16. Service by email, Courtesy copies to the Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Cross-Complaint To Add Cause Of Action
Off Calendar Jan-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter Bales, Esq. (415-227-0900) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Golden Gateway.
Alex Weyand, Esq. (415-536-2856) for Defendants/Cross-Complainants/Moving party HELEN LIPPERT and ROBERT GALEMMO.

The Court announces the tentative ruling on the motion for leave to amend. Argued. Parties request a different trial date in Dept. 206. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling with midification as follows:

CROSS COMPLAINANTS HELEN LIPPERT and ROBERT GALEMMO's Motion For Leave To Amend Cross-Complaint To Add Cause Of Action is GRANTED. First Amended Cross-Complaint shall be filed and served forthwith. Trial is continued to June 13, 2016 at 9:30 am in Dept. 206. All discovery deadlines to be calculated based on the new trial date. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
